inline_comments.message:
I don't think this is right.  
The service name template is taking the chart name and the values entry is strangely:   serviceName: aai-aai

Also you delete the "."

Good catch on the missing "."  I'll have to follow up with you on your other comment though.  "aai" is the service name I am intending to use.  The exposed aai services are:

$ kubectl get svc -n onap
NAME                  TYPE        CLUSTER-IP      EXTERNAL-IP   PORT(S)                                                             AGE
aai                   NodePort    10.43.236.33    <none>        8080:30232/TCP,8443:30233/TCP                                       17s
aai-cassandra         ClusterIP   None            <none>        9042/TCP,9160/TCP                                                   17s
aai-elasticsearch     ClusterIP   None            <none>        9200/TCP                                                            17s
aai-hbase             ClusterIP   None            <none>        2181/TCP,8080/TCP,8085/TCP,9090/TCP,16000/TCP,16010/TCP,16201/TCP   17s
aai-modelloader       NodePort    10.43.233.212   <none>        8080:30210/TCP,8443:30229/TCP                                       17s
aai-resources         ClusterIP   None            <none>        8447/TCP,5005/TCP                                                   17s
aai-search-data       ClusterIP   None            <none>        9509/TCP                                                            17s
aai-sparky-be         ClusterIP   None            <none>        9517/TCP                                                            17s
aai-traversal         ClusterIP   None            <none>        8446/TCP,5005/TCP                                                   17s
